description: A customer cancelled their policy last week and is calling to see when they will receive their prorated refund.

nodes.task_description: Identify the former customer and their cancelled policy.
Check the payment system for the status of the refund check.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that the refund check was processed and mailed yesterday.

nodes.task_description: Inform the customer that the check has been mailed and provide the check number and amount.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a clear status update to the customer.
